# Vectore

> Vectore is an all-in-one platform for creators and educators to run courses, cohorts, coaching, live events, and community in one place, with community as the core engine and 0% transaction fees on sales.

Vectore brings courses, cohorts, coaching, workshops, events, quizzes, assessments, surveys, gamification, automation, analytics, and payments together, so learning businesses stop stitching separate tools together. It is currently in a founding-member private beta.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://vectore.app/): product overview, features, and the founding waitlist.
- [Contact](https://vectore.app/contact): reach the Vectore team about the product, waitlist, support, or partnerships.
- [Privacy Policy](https://vectore.app/privacy): how Vectore handles data.
- [Terms of Service](https://vectore.app/terms): terms for using Vectore.

## What Vectore does
- Teach your way: self-paced courses, cohort-based programs, group coaching, and live workshops.
- Measure learning: auto-graded quizzes, rubric-based assessments, feedback surveys, and per-learner progress reports.
- Build community: discussion posts, chats, challenges, gamification (XP, levels, leaderboards), and member matching.
- Events and coaching: scheduling, booking, and live events run from one platform.
- Automate the busywork: a visual workflow builder for onboarding, access control, and recurring tasks.
- Know what's working: participation, performance, and revenue analytics.
- Get paid: sell courses, cohorts, and coaching with 0% transaction fees.

## Key facts
- Transaction fees: 0% on product sales. Creators keep 100% of their earnings.
- Founding members: lifetime lowest pricing and early access before public launch.
- Status: founding-member private beta. Join the waitlist at https://vectore.app/.
- Category: community and learning platform (SaaS) for coaches, creators, and educators.
